summary: The diff modifies VisionBoard.tsx and related files, but the change described in the file summary is about replacing a textarea with individual input rows for milestones (an 'Add Milestone' UI change). The build request specifically asks to revert/correct only the instructional/helper text inside the 'Add Milestone' dialog to match the user's original wording, without changing logic, layout, or styling. The diff summary for VisionBoard.tsx describes a layout/interaction change (individual input rows with add/remove controls instead of a single textarea), which appears to contradict the constraint of not changing logic or layout. Since the VisionBoard.tsx content is truncated, it is impossible to confirm whether the instructional text was actually corrected.

missing_requirements.requirement: Revert or correct the instructional/helper text inside the 'Add Milestone' dialog to match exactly what the user originally requested, without changing any logic, layout, or styling.
missing_requirements.reason: The file summary for VisionBoard.tsx describes a structural/layout change to the milestones field (replacing a single textarea with individual input rows with add/remove controls), which goes beyond changing only instructional/helper text. The diff content is truncated so the actual text change cannot be confirmed. There is no evidence that only the text was changed as specified.

hallucinated_features.description: The milestones input in the GoalFormDialog was changed from a single textarea to individual input rows with add (+ button / Enter key) and remove (x) controls.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states not to change any logic, layout, or styling — only the instructional/helper text. Replacing a textarea with individual input rows is a layout and interaction/logic change that was not requested.
